name: Souffl Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to its lowest setting.
2. Grease a 2 litre/3 pint loose-bottomed cake tin with the butter.
3. Beat the egg whites to form stiff peaks.
4. Mix in half the caster sugar, beating until stiff and shiny.
5. Add the remaining caster sugar and cocoa, then beat for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared tin.
7. Bake for approximately 40 minutes. The cake will rise and then sink down again.
8. Let the cake cool in the tin.
9. Whip the cream with sugar and rum to taste.
10. Spread over the top of the cake while it is still in the tin and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
11. Keep in the fridge overnight.
12. One hour before serving, put the cake in the freezer.
13. Serve directly from the freezer. Loosen the cake from the edges of the tin with a sharp knife and place on a serving plate.
